name: pit-instrument-drift
notes: Instrument drift must not pass undetected. chaiConfig.truncateThreshold is an evidence-affecting setting that enters the instrument config_digest. Changing it between two runs changes the measuring instrument, so the comparator must NOT claim exact: it reports comparability none with reason instrument-changed, and (per the instrument-changed exception) still surfaces the observable runner-config-changed verification_surface event.

steps.content:
import { defineConfig } from 'vitest/config'
export default defineConfig({ test: { chaiConfig: { truncateThreshold: 9999 } } })
